name: Strawberry Ginger Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup mixed blueberries and red raspberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the strawberry juice, ginger juice (or to taste), banana in a blender or use an immersion blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add sparkling apple cider and pour into chilled soup bowls.
4. Serve with a dollop of yogurt, scattering of fresh berries and garnish with mint sprigs.
Yield: 4 servings
